title: amblirion pudicum
side_effects: Amblirion pudicum can have side effects if used improperly, such as nausea, dizziness, and rapid heartbeat in individuals who consume it in excess. In rare cases, prolonged use can lead to kidney damage and liver inflammation due to its toxic compounds. Additionally, using Amblirion pudicum for medicinal purposes without proper training or supervision can result in allergic reactions, including skin irritation and respiratory issues. It is essential to consult a medical professional before using this plant for any health-related purposes.
